name: Crouton
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bread into small squares.
2. Spread the bread squares in a baking pan and add your favorite herbs and spices.
3. Bake at 200 to 225°F for up to 2 hours, stirring and poking with a fork every 30 minutes until golden brown and crispy.
Enjoy these low fat, low calorie, and delicious croutons!
